This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, representing a rare opportunity for a collector or discerning buyer. The exterior paint is entirely flawless, retaining its original factory luster without a single scratch or swirl mark. Inside, the cabin is pristine, with the leather and trim appearing as if they have never been touched. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history and stored in a climate-controlled environment. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the showroom floor.

Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to take it for a spin!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minimal exterior wear. Title in hand.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive overall condition. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, showing only the lightest signs of careful use consistent with its history. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean, featuring well-preserved upholstery and a full suite of operational electronics. Mechanically, it is robust and dependable, having undergone regular servicing to ensure a smooth, responsive driving experience. It offers a perfect blend of reliability and aesthetic appeal for anyone seeking a high-quality pre-owned car that is ready for the road immediately.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a commitment to mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. This unit offers a refined driving experience characterized by consistent performance and a sophisticated interior environment. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of prestige and proven reliability.

This vehicle represents a distinguished choice for the discerning driver, offering a harmonious blend of performance and sustained reliability. Supported by a documented service history, this automobile stands as a testament to responsible ownership and enduring value. We invite you to experience the superior handling and sophisticated engineering that define this exceptional offering.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my reliable ride, and I think you're going to love it! It’s in really solid shape and has been so dependable for me over the years. It drives smoothly and still looks great parked in the driveway. If you're looking for a trustworthy car that's ready for many more miles of fun, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Available is a driver-focused 2004 BMW M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six engine, delivering linear power through six independent throttle bodies. This example is mechanically sound, with the critical VANOS system serviced and the rear subframe reinforced to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. The chassis maintains its precision with refreshed bushings and a factory-spec limited-slip differential providing optimal torque distribution. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive valve adjustment and rod bearing inspection, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain remains within tight tolerances. This M3 offers a pure analog driving experience with the tactile feedback of a hydraulic rack-and-pinion steering system, representing a well-maintained specimen of a modern classic.
Used car in good condition. Maintenance current. Clean title. Runs well.

This vehicle is a well-maintained example that balances performance with everyday reliability. The exterior retains a beautiful luster, showing only minor cosmetic imperfections such as small stone chips on the hood and light surface scratches consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is clean and inviting; the seats are free of rips or stains, and the dashboard remains crack-free with all buttons and electronic features—including the dual-zone climate control and infotainment system—working exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is in great shape, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and an engine that runs quietly and efficiently. It comes with a documented service history, including a recent oil change and a multi-point inspection. The tires offer excellent grip with substantial tread remaining, ensuring a confident driving experience. This is a solid, dependable car that has been cared for and is ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and significant aesthetic appeal, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this motorcar balances performance with enduring value.

This expertly maintained vehicle presents a distinguished profile and exceptional mechanical integrity. Demonstrating a rigorous service history and a refined aesthetic, it offers a superior driving experience for those who prioritize both reliability and class. A premier acquisition for the discerning professional seeking a well-preserved automotive investment.

Hey there! I’m so excited to help this reliable beauty find its next home! It’s been such a fantastic ride and has been really well-loved. It runs like a dream and is ready for all your upcoming road trips. It's in great shape and just waiting for someone new to get behind the wheel. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it feels on the road!

This E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and double VANOS for precise, linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox, the drivetrain is complemented by a factory limited-slip differential for optimal torque distribution. The chassis has been proactively maintained with rear subframe reinforcement and upgraded bushings to preserve torsional rigidity. It sits on a well-sorted suspension with Bilstein dampers, offering excellent damping characteristics and sharp turn-in. Showing minor cosmetic patina appropriate for its age, this example remains mechanically robust, delivering the visceral analog feedback and balanced weight distribution
Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior scuffs. Maintenance up to date.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-maintained daily driver that balances performance with everyday practicality. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish, showing only the minor, expected signs of road use, while the body panels remain straight and free of significant blemishes. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health; the engine pulls strong, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin with supple upholstery and a clean dashboard. All power features, including the infotainment system and dual-zone climate control, are fully operational. With a set of high-tread tires and a recent multi-point inspection already completed, this car is turn-key and ready for its next owner. It provides a smooth, quiet ride that reflects the care it has received over the years.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s looking for a new home! It's been super reliable for me and still runs like a dream. It’s been really well-loved and looked after, so it's totally ready to hit the road with its next owner. It's the perfect choice if you're looking for a solid, dependable car that’s ready for any adventure. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, complete with individual throttle bodies and a recently recalibrated VANOS system for optimal cam timing. The power is delivered through a precise 6-speed manual transmission to a limited-slip differential, ensuring exceptional mechanical grip. The chassis has been enhanced with reinforced subframe mounting points to address common floor pan fatigue, and the suspension retains its factory-spec geometry for sharp turn-in. Maintenance is current, including a recent valve clearance adjustment and cooling system overhaul. While the exterior shows minor patina consistent with spirited road use, the drivetrain remains robust and the throttle response is telepathic.
Used car in good condition. Maintenance current. Clean title. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and reliability, having been meticulously maintained by a non-smoking owner. The exterior paint retains a deep luster, accented by well-kept alloy wheels and only minor surface marks typical of careful road use. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean, featuring premium leather upholstery that remains supple and supportive, alongside a fully functional suite of modern tech, including a high-resolution navigation system and a premium audio package. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health; the engine delivers smooth, consistent power, and the transmission shifts flawlessly. It has a comprehensive service history with a recent oil change and brake inspection just completed, ensuring it is ready for the road immediately. If you are looking for a dependable, high-quality driver that looks as good as it performs, this is the one.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and aesthetic excellence, it offers a refined driving experience synonymous with quality. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this unit stands as a testament to responsible ownership and enduring performance.
